title: Psamma × baltica

Psamma × baltica is often classified as an early vascular plant due to its unique characteristics. The exact classification of Psamma × baltica is still a subject of ongoing research in the field of paleobotany. Further studies are needed to determine its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
uses: Psamma × baltica has been found in the fossil record of the Baltic region and is considered to be an extinct species of plant. However, its medicinal uses are not well-documented.
